tool_input.command: bash .claude/skills/nabledge-6/scripts/full-text-search.sh "PathParam" "QueryParam" "JAX-RS" "ルーティング" "REST" "パスパラメータ" "クエリパラメータ"
tool_input.description: Full-text search for REST API path/query parameter keywords

tool_input.command:
SCRIPT_DIR="/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/scripts"
SKILL_DIR="/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6"
KNOWLEDGE_DIR="$SKILL_DIR/knowledge"
MAX_RESULTS=15

keywords=("PathParam" "QueryParam" "JAX-RS" "ルーティング" "REST" "パスパラメータ" "クエリパラメータ")

count_exprs=""
for kw in "${keywords[@]}"; do
  if [ -n "$count_exprs" ]; then
    count_exprs="$count_exprs + "
  fi
  escaped=$(echo "$kw" | sed 's/[.[\\(*+?{|^$]/\\&/g')
  count_exprs="${count_exprs}(if test(\"$escaped\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end)"
done

find "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR" -name "*.json" | sort | while read -r filepath; do
  relpath="${filepath#$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/}"
  jq -r --arg file "$relpath" \
    '.sections[] |
     ((.title + " " + .content) | '"$count_exprs"') as $score |
     select($score > 0) |
     "\($score)\t\($file)|\(.id)"' \
    "$filepath" 2>/dev/null
done | sort -t$'\t' -k1 -rn | head -n "$MAX_RESULTS" | cut -f2
tool_input.description: Run full-text search for REST API path/query parameters across knowledge files

tool_input.command:
KNOWLEDGE_DIR="/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge"
MAX_RESULTS=15

count_exprs="(if test(\"PathParam\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test(\"QueryParam\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test(\"JAX-RS\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test(\"REST\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test(\"パスパラメータ\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test(\"クエリパラメータ\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end) + (if test(\"ルーティング\"; \"i\") then 1 else 0 end)"

find "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR" -name "*.json" | sort | while read -r filepath; do
  relpath="${filepath#$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/}"
  jq -r --arg file "$relpath" \
    '.sections[] |
     ((.title + " " + .content) | '"$count_exprs"') as $score |
     select($score > 0) |
     "\($score)\t\($file)|\(.id)"' \
    "$filepath" 2>/dev/null
done | sort -t$'\t' -k1 -rn | head -n "$MAX_RESULTS" | cut -f2
tool_input.description: Run full-text search using inline count expressions
